deliverables.notes: Two-sheet workbook with one row per module, formula-backed flags, summary counts, citations, and notes.
Markdown brief with calculations, assumptions, exceptions, validation checks, uncertainty notes, and final decision table.

notes: The preferred @oai/artifact-tool import was unavailable in this environment, so the workbook was generated directly as OOXML with cached formula values.
A serializer bug in the first workbook build was repaired and the deliverables were regenerated before finalization.

validation.check: xlsx zip entries and workbook/sheet XML parse
row-level decision logic and markdown content review
